<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Authentication</h3><a id="user-content-authentication" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Authentication" href="#authentication"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>JWT token-based authentication</li>
<li>Secure password hashing dengan bcryptjs</li>
<li>Token expiration otomatis</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Authorization</h3><a id="user-content-authorization" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Authorization" href="#authorization"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)</li>
<li>Fine-grained permissions per action</li>
<li>Endpoint protection dengan auth middleware</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Input Validation</h3><a id="user-content-input-validation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Input Validation" href="#input-validation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Data Protection</h3><a id="user-content-data-protection" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Data Protection" href="#data-protection"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Database Optimization</h3><a id="user-content-database-optimization" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Database Optimization" href="#database-optimization"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Caching</h3><a id="user-content-caching" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Caching" href="#caching"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">

</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Horizontal Scaling</h3><a id="user-content-horizontal-scaling" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Horizontal Scaling" href="#horizontal-scaling"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Stateless API design</li>
<li>PM2 cluster mode support</li>
<li>Separate cronjob process</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>PM2 Configuration:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Start main API
pm2 start pm2-index.json

# Start cronjob
pm2 start pm2-cronjob.json

# Monitor
pm2 monit"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Start main API</span>
pm2 start pm2-index.json

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Start cronjob</span>
pm2 start pm2-cronjob.json

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Monitor</span>
pm2 monit</pre></div>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🐛 Troubleshooting</h2><a id="user-content--troubleshooting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🐛 Troubleshooting" href="#-troubleshooting"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Database Connection Error</h3><a id="user-content-database-connection-error" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Database Connection Error" href="#database-connection-error"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432"><pre class="notranslate"><code>Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Solution</strong>: Pastikan PostgreSQL sudah running dan credentials di <code>.env</code> benar.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Port Already in Use</h3><a id="user-content-port-already-in-use" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Port Already in Use" href="#port-already-in-use"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::3000"><pre class="notranslate"><code>Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::3000
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Solution</strong>: Ubah PORT di <code>.env</code> atau kill existing process.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Migration Error</h3><a id="user-content-migration-error" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Migration Error" href="#migration-error"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Error: Query timeout"><pre class="notranslate"><code>Error: Query timeout
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Solution</strong>: Pastikan database sudah created dan migration belum pernah dijalankan.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">JWT Token Invalid</h3><a id="user-content-jwt-token-invalid" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: JWT Token Invalid" href="#jwt-token-invalid"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="Error: JsonWebTokenError: invalid token"><pre class="notranslate"><code>Error: JsonWebTokenError: invalid token
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Solution</strong>: Pastikan JWT_SECRET di <code>.env</code> sama di server. Re-login untuk mendapatkan token baru.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">How to deploy</h1><a id="user-content-how-to-deploy" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How to deploy" href="#how-to-deploy"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Copy file config and .env</h1><a id="user-content-1-copy-file-config-and-env" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Copy file config and .env" href="#1-copy-file-config-and-env"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Copy file config.json.example into config.json inside folder config if needed
Copy file .env.example into .env if needed</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Get serial number hardisk</h1><a id="user-content-2-get-serial-number-hardisk" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Get serial number hardisk" href="#2-get-serial-number-hardisk"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Open cmd then type: wmic bios get serialnumber
Push  to variable validSerials inside serverService/index.js file</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Install dependecies</h1><a id="user-content-3-install-dependecies" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Install dependecies" href="#3-install-dependecies"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">type in cmd:
npm i -g sequelize-cli
npm i</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Migrate database &amp; seed</h1><a id="user-content-4-migrate-database--seed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Migrate database &amp; seed" href="#4-migrate-database--seed"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'template'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">NOTE if using defaultValue cretaed_at and updated_at:
created_at / updated_at untuk database MySQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: -7 jam.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. keduanya OK.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Migration setting:
created_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}
updated_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}</p>
<p dir="auto">created_at / updated_at untuk database MSSQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: jam sesuai tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. Tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">UPDATE:
v3.0 :</p>

<li>Delete default value created_at and updated_at in table user</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at in table action_page_role</li>
<li>created_at dan updated_at di setiap table perlu ditambahkan ke payload saat query</li>
<li>Add request_id in response and log</li>

</ol>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>npm run eject</code></h3><a id="user-content-npm-run-eject" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: npm run eject" href="#npm-run-eject"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Note: this is a one-way operation. Once you <code>eject</code>, you can't go back!</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">If you aren't satisfied with the build tool and configuration choices, you can <code>eject</code> at any time. This command will remove the single build dependency from your project.</p>
<p dir="auto">Instead, it will copy all the configuration files and the transitive dependencies (webpack, Babel, ESLint, etc) right into your project so you have full control over them. All of the commands except <code>eject</code> will still work, but they will point to the copied scripts so you can tweak them. At this point you're on your own.</p>
<p dir="auto">You don't have to ever use <code>eject</code>. The curated feature set is suitable for small and middle deployments, and you shouldn't feel obligated to use this feature. However we understand that this tool wouldn't be useful if you couldn't customize it when you are ready for it.</p>

</code></pre></div>

<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'sql_template_backend'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">UPDATE:
v3.0 :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Remove attr sequence in table page</li>
<li>Remove attr sequence in table action_page</li>
<li>Add attr created_at and updated_at without default value in table privilege</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at and updated_at in table user</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at in table action_page_privilege</li>
<li>created_at dan updated_at di setiap table perlu ditambahkan ke payload saat query</li>
<li>Add request_id in response and log</li>
<li>Add check storage in user route</li>
<li>Print application name and version</li>
<li>Simplify log file into one. Before: separate between error and info.</li>
<li>Update serial number authorized</li>
<li>add tests spec end to end</li>
<li>Add validation request parameter, body, and query</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">NOTE if using defaultValue cretaed_at and updated_at:
created_at / updated_at untuk database MySQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: -7 jam.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. keduanya OK.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Migration setting:
created_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}
updated_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}</p>
<p dir="auto">created_at / updated_at untuk database MSSQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: jam sesuai tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. Tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>

<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'sql_template_backend'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">UPDATE:
v3.0 :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Remove attr sequence in table page</li>
<li>Remove attr sequence in table action_page</li>
<li>Add attr created_at and updated_at without default value in table privilege</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at and updated_at in table user</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at in table action_page_privilege</li>
<li>created_at dan updated_at di setiap table perlu ditambahkan ke payload saat query</li>
<li>Add request_id in response and log</li>
<li>Add check storage in user route</li>
<li>Print application name and version</li>
<li>Simplify log file into one. Before: separate between error and info.</li>
<li>Update serial number authorized</li>
<li>add tests spec end to end</li>
<li>Add validation request parameter, body, and query</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">NOTE if using defaultValue cretaed_at and updated_at:
created_at / updated_at untuk database MySQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: -7 jam.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. keduanya OK.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Migration setting:
created_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}
updated_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}</p>
<p dir="auto">created_at / updated_at untuk database MSSQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: jam sesuai tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. Tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
</article></div>2e:T33d2,<div id="readme" class="md" data-path="README.md"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Ravelware Transformation API</h1><a id="user-content-ravelware-transformation-api" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Ravelware Transformation API" href="#ravelware-transformation-api"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A RESTful API for the Ravelware Transformation application, built with <a href="https://bun.com" rel="nofollow">Bun</a>, <a href="https://elysiajs.com" rel="nofollow">Elysia</a>, and PostgreSQL via <a href="https://orm.drizzle.team" rel="nofollow">Drizzle ORM</a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tech Stack</h2><a id="user-content-tech-stack" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tech Stack" href="#tech-stack"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Runtime:</strong> Bun</li>
<li><strong>Framework:</strong> Elysia</li>
<li><strong>Database:</strong> PostgreSQL</li>
<li><strong>ORM:</strong> Drizzle ORM</li>
<li><strong>Auth:</strong> Session-based with bcryptjs</li>
<li><strong>Docs:</strong> Swagger (auto-generated)</li>
</ul>

<span class="pl-v">PORT</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">3000</span></pre></div>

bun run db:generate

bun run db:generate

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Run migrations</span>
bun run db:migrate

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Seed initial data</span>
bun run db:seed</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Running the Server</h3><a id="user-content-running-the-server" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Running the Server" href="#running-the-server"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

# Production

<p dir="auto">The server runs at <code>http://localhost:3000</code> by default.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">API Documentation</h2><a id="user-content-api-documentation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: API Documentation" href="#api-documentation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Sistem Absensi Sekolah berbasis RFID yang modern, cepat, dan terintegrasi dengan database PostgreSQL. Dikembangkan menggunakan Next.js 15 dan Prisma ORM.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fitur Utama</h2><a id="user-content-fitur-utama" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fitur Utama" href="#fitur-utama"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>🚀 <strong>Integrasi RFID Real-time</strong>: Koneksi via MQTT untuk respon instan.</li>
<li>📊 <strong>Dashboard Dinamis</strong>: Statistik kehadiran harian, mingguan, dan per kelas.</li>
<li>🏫 <strong>Classroom Monitoring</strong>: Pencatatan durasi mengajar guru secara otomatis.</li>
<li>🧑‍💻 <strong>Manajemen Data</strong>: CRUD Siswa, Guru, dan Staff lengkap dengan info RFID.</li>
<li>📁 <strong>Riwayat &amp; Export</strong>: Filter riwayat absensi dan export ke format CSV.</li>
<li>🖼️ <strong>Carousel Management</strong>: Kelola pengumuman visual di halaman display.</li>
<li>🌗 <strong>Dark Mode</strong>: Tampilan premium yang mendukung mode gelap/terang.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prerequisites</h2><a id="user-content-prerequisites" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prerequisites" href="#prerequisites"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://nodejs.org/" rel="nofollow">Node.js</a> (v18+)</li>
<li><a href="https://www.postgresql.org/" rel="nofollow">PostgreSQL</a> (Local atau Cloud)</li>
<li>MQTT Broker (opsional, default menggunakan HiveMQ)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Getting Started</h2><a id="user-content-getting-started" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Getting Started" href="#getting-started"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Instalasi Dependencies:</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npm install"><pre>npm install</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Konfigurasi Environment:</strong>
Buat file <code>.env</code> dan sesuaikan variabel berikut:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-dotenv notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Database
DATABASE_URL=&quot;postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/smk_absensi&quot;

# MQTT (Opsional, sudah terisi default HiveMQ)
NEXT_PUBLIC_MQTT_BROKER_URL=&quot;...&quot;
NEXT_PUBLIC_MQTT_USERNAME=&quot;...&quot;
NEXT_PUBLIC_MQTT_PASSWORD=&quot;...&quot;
NEXT_PUBLIC_MQTT_TOPIC=&quot;absensi-sekolah-rfid&quot;"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Database</span>
<span class="pl-v">DATABASE_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/smk_absensi<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> MQTT (Opsional, sudah terisi default HiveMQ)</span>
<span class="pl-v">NEXT_PUBLIC_MQTT_BROKER_URL</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>...<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
<span class="pl-v">NEXT_PUBLIC_MQTT_USERNAME</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>...<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>

</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Setup Database:</strong></p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Migrate database &amp; seed</h1><a id="user-content-4-migrate-database--seed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Migrate database &amp; seed" href="#4-migrate-database--seed"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'sql_template_backend'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">NOTE if using defaultValue cretaed_at and updated_at:
created_at / updated_at untuk database MySQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: -7 jam.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. keduanya OK.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Migration setting:
created_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}
updated_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}</p>
<p dir="auto">created_at / updated_at untuk database MSSQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: jam sesuai tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. Tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>

<p dir="auto">Backend API untuk sistem Dimensional Weighing System (DWS) PT Ravelware Technology Indonesia.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">✨ Features</h2><a id="user-content--features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ✨ Features" href="#-features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Sistem ini mencakup berbagai modul utama:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>✅ <strong>Authentication</strong>: Sign-in via username/email &amp; JWT integration.</li>
<li>✅ <strong>User Management</strong>: Full CRUD dengan validasi input.</li>
<li>✅ <strong>Role &amp; ACL</strong>: Manajemen hak akses berbasis role (Access Control List).</li>
<li>✅ <strong>Media Processing</strong>: Upload &amp; streaming gambar, integrasi AWS S3.</li>
<li>✅ <strong>Data Exchange</strong>: Import &amp; Export data melalui Excel.</li>
<li>✅ <strong>Connectivity</strong>: Terintegrasi dengan MQTT &amp; Websocket.</li>
<li>✅ <strong>Security</strong>: Validasi Serial Number hardware (HDD/BIOS).</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔑 Environment Variables</h3><a id="user-content--environment-variables" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔑 Environment Variables" href="#-environment-variables"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<span class="pl-v">S3_BUCKET_NAME</span><span class="pl-k">=</span><span class="pl-s">your_bucket_name</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">📡 API Endpoints</h3><a id="user-content--api-endpoints" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📡 API Endpoints" href="#-api-endpoints"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<tbody>
<tr>
<td align="left"><code>/api/s3/presigned-url</code></td>
<td align="left"><code>GET</code></td>
<td align="left">Mendapatkan Pre-signed URL untuk akses file.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td align="left"><code>/api/s3/upload-url</code></td>
<td align="left"><code>POST</code></td>
<td align="left">Mendapatkan URL untuk upload langsung (<code>PUT</code>) dari client.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td align="left"><code>/api/s3/upload-base64</code></td>
<td align="left"><code>POST</code></td>
<td align="left">Upload file melalui server (convert base64 ke biner).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td align="left"><code>/api/s3/dws-upload</code></td>
<td align="left"><code>POST</code></td>
<td align="left">Mekanisme upload khusus DWS dengan <strong>Auto-Retry</strong>.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🛠️ DWS Upload Mechanism (Workflow)</h3><a id="user-content-️-dws-upload-mechanism-workflow" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🛠️ DWS Upload Mechanism (Workflow)" href="#️-dws-upload-mechanism-workflow"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Sesuai standar operasional DWS:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Request URL</strong>: Sistem menghasilkan Pre-signed URL (<code>PUT</code>).</li>
<li><strong>Binary Upload</strong>: Konversi base64 otomatis ke biner dan diunggah via HTTP <code>PUT</code> ke S3.</li>
<li><strong>Mekanisme Retry</strong>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Exponential Backoff</strong>: Jeda meningkat (1s, 3s, 5s, 7s, 10s).</li>
<li><strong>Limit</strong>: Maksimal 5x percobaan jika terjadi kegagalan jaringan.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>Spesifikasi</strong>: JPG/JPEG, Low-Res (640x480), Max 50KB.</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🔗 External Integration (Webhook)</h2><a id="user-content--external-integration-webhook" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🔗 External Integration (Webhook)" href="#-external-integration-webhook"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Endpoint untuk menerima data dari sistem eksternal DWS dan mendistribusikannya ke target webhook yang terdaftar.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">📡 API Endpoints</h3><a id="user-content--api-endpoints-1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📡 API Endpoints" href="#-api-endpoints-1"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🛠️ Webhook Workflow</h3><a id="user-content-️-webhook-workflow" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🛠️ Webhook Workflow" href="#️-webhook-workflow"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Idempotency</strong>: Menggunakan <code>awb_number</code> sebagai identifier utama untuk mencegah duplikasi data.</li>
<li><strong>Persistence</strong>: Data disimpan ke dalam tabel <code>history</code> (field <code>barcode</code>).</li>
<li><strong>Forwarding</strong>: Payload diteruskan ke endpoint eksternal yang diatur dalam konfigurasi webhook system.</li>
<li><strong>Tracking</strong>: Status sinkronisasi (<code>SUCCESS</code>/<code>FAILED</code>) dicatat dalam database untuk audit.</li>
</ol>

<ul dir="auto">
<li>💡 <strong>S3 Integration</strong>: Menambahkan modul lengkap AWS S3 (Repository, Service, Controller).</li>
<li>💡 <strong>DWS Workflow</strong>: Implementasi upload biner dengan <em>Exponential Backoff</em>.</li>
<li>💡 <strong>Log Management</strong>: Penyesuaian <code>LOG_LEVEL</code> (error, warn, info, debug) dan rotasi file harian.</li>
<li>💡 <strong>Security</strong>: Update otorisasi Serial Number BIOS.</li>
<li>💡 <strong>Validation</strong>: Input validation menggunakan <code>express-validator</code> untuk semua route.</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Scripts</h2><a id="user-content-scripts" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Scripts" href="#scripts"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npm install &amp;&amp; npm run dev   # development
npm run build                # production build
sonar                        # sonar scan"><pre>npm install <span class="pl-k">&amp;&amp;</span> npm run dev   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> development</span>
npm run build                <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> production build</span>
sonar                        <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> sonar scan</span></pre></div>

<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'template'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">NOTE if using defaultValue cretaed_at and updated_at:
created_at / updated_at untuk database MySQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: -7 jam.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. keduanya OK.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Migration setting:
created_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}
updated_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}</p>
<p dir="auto">created_at / updated_at untuk database MSSQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: jam sesuai tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. Tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">UPDATE:
v3.0 :</p>

<li>Remove attr sequence in table page</li>
<li>Remove attr sequence in table action_page</li>
<li>Add attr created_at and updated_at without default value in table role</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at and updated_at in table user</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at in table action_page_role</li>
<li>created_at dan updated_at di setiap table perlu ditambahkan ke payload saat query</li>
<li>Add request_id in response and log</li>
<li>Add check storage in user route</li>
<li>Print application name and version</li>
<li>Simplify log file into one. Before: separate between error and info.</li>
<li>Update serial number authorized</li>
<li>add tests spec end to end</li>
<li>Add validation request parameter, body, and query</li>
</ol>

automatically update as you save the file.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Suggestions for a good README</h2><a id="user-content-suggestions-for-a-good-readme" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Suggestions for a good README" href="#suggestions-for-a-good-readme"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Every project is different, so consider which of these sections apply to yours. The sections used in the template are suggestions for most open source projects. Also keep in mind that while a README can be too long and detailed, too long is better than too short. If you think your README is too long, consider utilizing another form of documentation rather than cutting out information.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Name</h2><a id="user-content-name" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Name" href="#name"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Choose a self-explaining name for your project.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Description</h2><a id="user-content-description" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Description" href="#description"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Let people know what your project can do specifically. Provide context and add a link to any reference visitors might be unfamiliar with. A list of Features or a Background subsection can also be added here. If there are alternatives to your project, this is a good place to list differentiating factors.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Badges</h2><a id="user-content-badges" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Badges" href="#badges"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">On some READMEs, you may see small images that convey metadata, such as whether or not all the tests are passing for the project. You can use Shields to add some to your README. Many services also have instructions for adding a badge.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Visuals</h2><a id="user-content-visuals" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Visuals" href="#visuals"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Depending on what you are making, it can be a good idea to include screenshots or even a video (you'll frequently see GIFs rather than actual videos). Tools like ttygif can help, but check out Asciinema for a more sophisticated method.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Installation</h2><a id="user-content-installation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Installation" href="#installation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Within a particular ecosystem, there may be a common way of installing things, such as using Yarn, NuGet, or Homebrew. However, consider the possibility that whoever is reading your README is a novice and would like more guidance. Listing specific steps helps remove ambiguity and gets people to using your project as quickly as possible. If it only runs in a specific context like a particular programming language version or operating system or has dependencies that have to be installed manually, also add a Requirements subsection.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Usage</h2><a id="user-content-usage" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Usage" href="#usage"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Use examples liberally, and show the expected output if you can. It's helpful to have inline the smallest example of usage that you can demonstrate, while providing links to more sophisticated examples if they are too long to reasonably include in the README.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Support</h2><a id="user-content-support" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Support" href="#support"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Tell people where they can go to for help. It can be any combination of an issue tracker, a chat room, an email address, etc.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Roadmap</h2><a id="user-content-roadmap" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Roadmap" href="#roadmap"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you have ideas for releases in the future, it is a good idea to list them in the README.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contributing</h2><a id="user-content-contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contributing" href="#contributing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">State if you are open to contributions and what your requirements are for accepting them.</p>
<p dir="auto">For people who want to make changes to your project, it's helpful to have some documentation on how to get started. Perhaps there is a script that they should run or some environment variables that they need to set. Make these steps explicit. These instructions could also be useful to your future self.</p>
<p dir="auto">You can also document commands to lint the code or run tests. These steps help to ensure high code quality and reduce the likelihood that the changes inadvertently break something. Having instructions for running tests is especially helpful if it requires external setup, such as starting a Selenium server for testing in a browser.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Authors and acknowledgment</h2><a id="user-content-authors-and-acknowledgment" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Authors and acknowledgment" href="#authors-and-acknowledgment"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Show your appreciation to those who have contributed to the project.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">License</h2><a id="user-content-license" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: License" href="#license"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">For open source projects, say how it is licensed.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Project status</h2><a id="user-content-project-status" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Project status" href="#project-status"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you have run out of energy or time for your project, put a note at the top of the README saying that development has slowed down or stopped completely. Someone may choose to fork your project or volunteer to step in as a maintainer or owner, allowing your project to keep going. You can also make an explicit request for maintainers.</p>

</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong><a href="docs/05-user-guide.md">05-user-guide.md</a></strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Panduan pengguna aplikasi</li>
<li>Fitur dan cara penggunaan</li>
<li>Tips &amp; tricks</li>
<li>Troubleshooting</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ol>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Preview production build</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Code quality check</span>
