<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Environment Management</h2><a id="user-content-1-environment-management" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Environment Management" href="#1-environment-management"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini mendukung dua tipe konfigurasi environment:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong><code>public/runtime-env.js</code></strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Dipakai untuk mengubah environment <strong>saat runtime</strong> (misalnya API URL berbeda di staging vs production tanpa rebuild).</li>
<li>File ini akan di-load langsung di browser.</li>
<li>Contoh isinya:
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="window.RUNTIME_ENV = {
  REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST: &quot;false&quot;,
  REACT_APP_API_HOST: &quot;http://localhost:3000/api&quot;,
  REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST: &quot;ws://localhost:3000&quot;,
  REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST: &quot;mqtt://localhost:1883&quot;,
  REACT_APP_NAME: &quot;Shadcn Template Webserver&quot;,
};"><pre><span class="pl-smi">window</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">RUNTIME_ENV</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"false"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_API_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"http://localhost:3000/api"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"ws://localhost:3000"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"mqtt://localhost:1883"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_NAME</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Shadcn Template Webserver"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong><code>.env</code></strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Dipakai di <strong>local development</strong> atau saat <strong>build</strong> untuk variable sensitif.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Contoh:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="NODE_ENV=development
NODE_PATH=./src
REACT_APP_NAME=Shadcn Template Webserver
REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST=false
REACT_APP_API_HOST=http://89.116.121.128:3001/
REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST=ws://localhost:3000
REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST=mqtt://localhost:1883
REACT_APP_MQTT_USERNAME=ravelware
REACT_APP_MQTT_PASSWORD=r4v3lw4r3
"><pre class="notranslate"><code>NODE_ENV=development
NODE_PATH=./src
REACT_APP_NAME=Shadcn Template Webserver
REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST=false
REACT_APP_API_HOST=http://89.116.121.128:3001/
REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST=ws://localhost:3000
REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST=mqtt://localhost:1883
REACT_APP_MQTT_USERNAME=ravelware
REACT_APP_MQTT_PASSWORD=r4v3lw4r3

</code></pre></div>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Menambahkan Komponen Baru (via shadcn)</h2><a id="user-content-2-menambahkan-komponen-baru-via-shadcn" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Menambahkan Komponen Baru (via shadcn)" href="#2-menambahkan-komponen-baru-via-shadcn"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Shadcn UI menyediakan generator komponen via CLI.</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Jalankan perintah:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npx shadcn@latest add button"><pre>npx shadcn@latest add button</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Ini akan menambahkan komponen <code>Button</code> ke folder <code>@/components/ui</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Untuk menambahkan beberapa komponen sekaligus:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npx shadcn@latest add input card dialog"><pre>npx shadcn@latest add input card dialog</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Semua komponen yang ditambahkan bisa langsung diimpor:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-tsx notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="import { Button } from &quot;@/components/ui/button&quot;;

export default function Example() {
  return &lt;Button&gt;Click Me&lt;/Button&gt;;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-v">Button</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"@/components/ui/button"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-v">Example</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">&lt;</span><span class="pl-v">Button</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span>Click Me<span class="pl-kos">&lt;/</span><span class="pl-v">Button</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Modifikasi Styling Token (index.css)</h2><a id="user-content-3-modifikasi-styling-token-indexcss" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Modifikasi Styling Token (index.css)" href="#3-modifikasi-styling-token-indexcss"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini pakai <strong>CSS custom properties</strong> (design tokens).</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Buka file <code>src/index.css</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Cari section <code>:root</code> (atau <code>.dark</code> untuk mode dark).<br>
Contoh bawaan:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=":root {
  --radius: 0.625rem;
  --background: oklch(96% 0.03 250);
  --foreground: oklch(0.145 0 0);
  --card: oklch(1 0 0);
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">:</span><span class="pl-c1">root</span> {
  <span class="pl-s1">--radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">0.625<span class="pl-smi">rem</span></span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--background</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">oklch</span>(<span class="pl-c1">96<span class="pl-smi">%</span></span> <span class="pl-c1">0.03</span> <span class="pl-c1">250</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--foreground</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">oklch</span>(<span class="pl-c1">0.145</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--card</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">oklch</span>(<span class="pl-c1">1</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
}</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Ubah sesuai kebutuhan.<br>
Misalnya mau ganti radius global:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=":root {
  --radius: 1rem;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">:</span><span class="pl-c1">root</span> {
  <span class="pl-s1">--radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">1<span class="pl-smi">rem</span></span>;
}</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Token ini dipakai di seluruh komponen shadcn (terintegrasi dengan Tailwind).</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Aturan Penamaan File dan Struktur Folder</h2><a id="user-content-4-aturan-penamaan-file-dan-struktur-folder" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Aturan Penamaan File dan Struktur Folder" href="#4-aturan-penamaan-file-dan-struktur-folder"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Penamaan Folder &amp; File</h3><a id="user-content-1-penamaan-folder--file" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Penamaan Folder &amp; File" href="#1-penamaan-folder--file"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Penamaan Folder</strong> → pakai <code>kebab-case</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Penamaan File</strong> → pakai <code>kebab-case</code> + <code>.ts</code>/<code>.tsx</code></li>
<li><strong>Variable/State</strong> → pakai <code>camelCase</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Penamaan Function</strong> → pakai <code>camelCase</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Penamaan Component Function</strong> → pakai <code>PascalCase</code>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Struktur Folder</h3><a id="user-content-2-struktur-folder" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Struktur Folder" href="#2-struktur-folder"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="├── ../
│   ├── public
│   │   ├── assets
│   │   │   ├── background.png
│   │   │   └── logo.png
│   │   ├── runtime-env.js
│   │   └── favicon.ico
│   ├── src

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">5. Menambahkan Route Baru (TanStack Router + Menu Config)</h2><a id="user-content-5-menambahkan-route-baru-tanstack-router--menu-config" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 5. Menambahkan Route Baru (TanStack Router + Menu Config)" href="#5-menambahkan-route-baru-tanstack-router--menu-config"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini pakai <strong>TanStack Router</strong> + <strong>Menu Config</strong> sebagai sumber truth.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Langkah 1: Tambahkan Page Baru</h3><a id="user-content-langkah-1-tambahkan-page-baru" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Langkah 1: Tambahkan Page Baru" href="#langkah-1-tambahkan-page-baru"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Buat file page, misalnya:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-tsx notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// src/pages/auth/Outbound.tsx
export default function Outbound() {
  return &lt;div&gt;Outbound Page&lt;/div&gt;;
}"><pre><span class="pl-c">// src/pages/auth/Outbound.tsx</span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-v">Outbound</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">&lt;</span><span class="pl-s1">div</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span>Outbound Page<span class="pl-kos">&lt;/</span><span class="pl-s1">div</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Langkah 2: Daftarkan di <code>MENU_LIST</code></h3><a id="user-content-langkah-2-daftarkan-di-menu_list" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Langkah 2: Daftarkan di MENU_LIST" href="#langkah-2-daftarkan-di-menu_list"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Edit <code>src/configs/menu-config.ts</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-ts notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="import { ArrowDownToLine } from &quot;lucide-react&quot;;
const Outbound = lazy(() =&gt; import(&quot;@/pages/auth/Outbound&quot;));

export const MENU_LIST: MenuListType[] = [
  // existing...
  {
    name: &quot;Outbound&quot;,
    code: &quot;Outbound&quot;,

    path: &quot;/outbound&quot;,
    component: Outbound,
    protected: true,
    showInMenu: true,
  },
];"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-v">ArrowDownToLine</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"lucide-react"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-c1">MENU_LIST</span>: <span class="pl-smi">MenuListType</span><span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">[</span>

<span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Langkah 3: Router Otomatis Generate</h3><a id="user-content-langkah-3-router-otomatis-generate" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Langkah 3: Router Otomatis Generate" href="#langkah-3-router-otomatis-generate"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Router akan otomatis menambahkan route dari <code>MENU_LIST</code>.<br>
Tidak perlu define manual lagi di <code>route.tsx</code>, cukup update <code>MENU_LIST</code>.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">6. Public vs Protected Route</h2><a id="user-content-6-public-vs-protected-route" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 6. Public vs Protected Route" href="#6-public-vs-protected-route"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Protected</strong> → pakai <code>RequireAuth</code> (butuh login namun bisa dibypass melalui isBypass = true).</li>
<li><strong>Public</strong> → pakai <code>RequireGuest</code> (untuk login/register page).</li>
<li>Flag <code>protected</code> di <code>MENU_LIST</code> menentukan masuknya route ke dalam public/protected.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">7. ACL Utility</h2><a id="user-content-7-acl-utility" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 7. ACL Utility" href="#7-acl-utility"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Utility ini digunakan untuk melakukan pengecekan izin (permission) berdasarkan <strong>ACL (Access Control List)</strong> yang disimpan di <code>aclStore</code>.<br>
Tujuannya agar komponen UI atau logic hanya berjalan jika user memiliki hak akses tertentu (Read, Create, Update, Delete).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Lokasi</h3><a id="user-content-lokasi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Lokasi" href="#lokasi"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>@/utils/has-permission.ts</code></p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Dependensi</h3><a id="user-content-dependensi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Dependensi" href="#dependensi"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>aclStore</code> dari <code>@/stores/acl-store</code><br>
Store ini menyimpan daftar action yang dimiliki user terhadap setiap page/module.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">API</h3><a id="user-content-api" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: API" href="#api"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>hasReadPermission(code: string): boolean</code></h4><a id="user-content-hasreadpermissioncode-string-boolean" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: hasReadPermission(code: string): boolean" href="#hasreadpermissioncode-string-boolean"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Mengecek apakah user memiliki permission <strong>Read</strong> untuk page/module dengan <code>page_code</code> tertentu.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>hasCreatePermission(code: string): boolean</code></h4><a id="user-content-hascreatepermissioncode-string-boolean" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: hasCreatePermission(code: string): boolean" href="#hascreatepermissioncode-string-boolean"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Mengecek apakah user memiliki permission <strong>Create</strong>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>hasUpdatePermission(code: string): boolean</code></h4><a id="user-content-hasupdatepermissioncode-string-boolean" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: hasUpdatePermission(code: string): boolean" href="#hasupdatepermissioncode-string-boolean"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Mengecek apakah user memiliki permission <strong>Delete</strong>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contoh Penggunaan</h3><a id="user-content-contoh-penggunaan" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contoh Penggunaan" href="#contoh-penggunaan"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

function UserTable() {
  if (!hasReadPermission(&quot;User&quot;)) {
    return &lt;p&gt;You don’t have permission to view users.&lt;/p&gt;;

  return (
    &lt;Table&gt;
      {/* kolom lainnya */}
      {hasUpdatePermission(&quot;User&quot;) &amp;&amp; (
        &lt;Button onClick={handleEdit}&gt;Edit User&lt;/Button&gt;

    &lt;/Table&gt;
  );

    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">&lt;</span><span class="pl-s1">p</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span>You don’t have permission to view users.<span class="pl-kos">&lt;/</span><span class="pl-s1">p</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

      <span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-c">/* kolom lainnya */</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-en">hasUpdatePermission</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"User"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span>

<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">8. Quick Reference</h2><a id="user-content-8-quick-reference" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 8. </article></div>3b:T3d78,<div id="readme" class="md" data-path="README.md"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Bun + Elysia + Drizzle API Template</h1><a id="user-content-bun--elysia--drizzle-api-template" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Bun + Elysia + Drizzle API Template" href="#bun--elysia--drizzle-api-template"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Templat backend modern menggunakan Bun, ElysiaJS, dan Drizzle ORM dengan PostgreSQL. Proyek ini dirancang dengan arsitektur berlapis (layered architecture) untuk skalabilitas dan kemudahan pemeliharaan.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">✨ Fitur Utama</h2><a id="user-content--fitur-utama" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ✨ Fitur Utama" href="#-fitur-utama"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🏗️ Featured Architecture</h2><a id="user-content-️-featured-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🏗️ Featured Architecture" href="#️-featured-architecture"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini menggunakan arsitektur yang dirancang untuk pengembangan skala enterprise:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Feature-Based Module</strong>: Setiap fitur (Auth, User, dll) dikelompokkan dalam satu folder <code>features/</code> yang berisi route, controller, service, dan repository-nya sendiri.</li>
<li><strong>Strict Layered Pattern</strong>: Memisahkan tanggung jawab dengan sangat ketat untuk memudahkan testing dan maintenance:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Route</code>: Definisi endpoint &amp; validasi skema.</li>
<li><code>Controller</code>: Orchestrator request &amp; response.</li>
<li><code>Service</code>: Pusat Business Logic (Satu file per action).</li>
<li><code>Repository</code>: Abstraksi Database (Satu file per query).</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><strong>Single Responsibility Principle (SRP)</strong>: Setiap file service dan repository hanya menangani satu tugas spesifik.</li>
<li><strong>Type-Safe Schema-Driven</strong>: Menggunakan Drizzle ORM untuk memastikan tipe data konsisten dari level Database hingga API Response.</li>
<li><strong>Centralized Error Handling</strong>: Sistem manajemen error terpusat yang memastikan response error selalu konsisten.</li>
<li><strong>Traceability</strong>: Setiap request dilengkapi dengan <code>traceId</code> untuk memudahkan debugging di log.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🏗️ Arsitektur Proyek (Feature-based Layered Architecture)</h2><a id="user-content-️-arsitektur-proyek-feature-based-layered-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🏗️ Arsitektur Proyek (Feature-based Layered Architecture)" href="#️-arsitektur-proyek-feature-based-layered-architecture"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Proyek ini menerapkan pola desain <strong>Feature-based Layered Architecture</strong> untuk memisahkan tanggung jawab secara modular. Alur data mengalir secara satu arah:</p>
<p dir="auto"><code>Client ➔ Route ➔ Controller ➔ Service ➔ Repository ➔ Database / Eksternal</code></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Route Layer (<code>src/features/*/</code>)</strong>: Menangani definisi endpoint, validasi skema input (via Elysia <code>t</code>), dan penerapan middleware.</li>
<li><strong>Controller Layer (<code>src/features/*/</code>)</strong>: Bertindak sebagai <em>orchestrator</em>. Mengambil data dari request, memanggil service yang sesuai, dan mengembalikan response HTTP.</li>
<li><strong>Service Layer (<code>src/features/*/services/</code>)</strong>: Pusat <em>business logic</em>. Berisi satu file per aksi (misal: <code>create-user.ts</code>) untuk menjaga prinsip <em>Single Responsibility</em>.</li>
<li><strong>Repository Layer (<code>src/features/*/repositories/</code>)</strong>: Lapisan akses data mentah. Berinteraksi langsung dengan Database menggunakan Drizzle ORM atau sistem eksternal.</li>
<li><strong>Schema Layer (<code>src/database/schema/</code>)</strong>: Definisi skema tabel dan relasi database yang menjadi sumber kebenaran tipe (<em>Source of Truth</em>) bagi seluruh aplikasi.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">📚 Dokumentasi Proyek</h2><a id="user-content--dokumentasi-proyek" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 📚 Dokumentasi Proyek" href="#-dokumentasi-proyek"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Informasi detail mengenai proyek ini dapat ditemukan di folder <code>docs/</code>:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><a href="docs/ARCHITECTURE.md"><strong>Arsitektur Proyek</strong></a> - Penjelasan tech stack dan pola desain.</li>
<li><a href="docs/CODE_STRUCTURE.md"><strong>Struktur Kode</strong></a> - Detail direktori dan tanggung jawab tiap layer.</li>
<li><a href="docs/BEST_PRACTICES.md"><strong>Best Practices</strong></a> - Panduan penulisan kode dan anti-pattern.</li>
<li><a href="docs/ERROR_HANDLING.md"><strong>Error Handling</strong></a> - Manajemen error terpusat.</li>
<li><a href="docs/MIGRATION.md"><strong>Panduan Migrasi</strong></a> - Cara migrasi ke struktur feature-based.</li>
</ol>



<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">🚀 Cara Menjalankan</h2><a id="user-content--cara-menjalankan" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🚀 Cara Menjalankan" href="#-cara-menjalankan"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Instalasi &amp; Setup</h3><a id="user-content-instalasi--setup" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Instalasi &amp; Setup" href="#instalasi--setup"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Migrate database &amp; seed</h1><a id="user-content-4-migrate-database--seed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Migrate database &amp; seed" href="#4-migrate-database--seed"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'sql_template_backend'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">UPDATE:
v3.0 :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Remove attr sequence in table page</li>
<li>Remove attr sequence in table action_page</li>
<li>Add attr created_at and updated_at without default value in table privilege</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at and updated_at in table user</li>
<li>Delete default value created_at in table action_page_privilege</li>
<li>created_at dan updated_at di setiap table perlu ditambahkan ke payload saat query</li>
<li>Add request_id in response and log</li>
<li>Add check storage in user route</li>
<li>Print application name and version</li>
<li>Simplify log file into one. Before: separate between error and info.</li>
<li>Update serial number authorized</li>
<li>add tests spec end to end</li>
<li>Add validation request parameter, body, and query</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">NOTE if using defaultValue cretaed_at and updated_at:
created_at / updated_at untuk database MySQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: -7 jam.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. keduanya OK.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Migration setting:
created_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}
updated_at: {
type: Sequelize.DATE,
defaultValue: Sequelize.literal('CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP')
}</p>
<p dir="auto">created_at / updated_at untuk database MSSQL</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Seeder: jam sesuai tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Create data: created_at otomatis, updated_at juga otomatis. Tapi format GMT +0.</li>
<li>Update data: updated_at OK</li>
<li>List data: masih ada timezone-nya, perlu diubah menjadi YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.SSS</li>
</ol>
</article></div>3d:T6a77,<div id="readme" class="md" data-path="README.md"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Edge PPE Monitoring</h1><a id="user-content-edge-ppe-monitoring" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Edge PPE Monitoring" href="#edge-ppe-monitoring"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A local IP camera monitoring demo application that provides real-time AI-powered detection and notifications for personal protective equipment (PPE) monitoring. This edge-deployed solution runs on mini PCs, supporting up to 4 IP cameras with RTSP streams, live streaming, and customizable AI inference using YOLO models.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Features</h2><a id="user-content-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Features" href="#features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Camera Management</strong>: Add, edit, and manage up to 4 IP cameras with RTSP URLs, Dummy stream is also available for demo purposes.</li>
<li><strong>Live Streaming</strong>: Real-time streaming from IP cameras via MediaMTX</li>
<li><strong>AI-Powered Detection</strong>: Cron-scheduled YOLO inference for customizable object detection classes</li>
<li><strong>Real-time Notifications</strong>: WebSocket-based notifications for detection events</li>
<li><strong>Detection Logs</strong>: Paginated logs with annotated images and detection details</li>
<li><strong>Edge Deployment</strong>: Self-contained Docker-based deployment with no cloud dependencies</li>
<li><strong>Flexible Configuration</strong>: Customizable detection schedules, models, classes, and notification templates</li>
<li><strong>Monitoring Dashboard</strong>: Web UI for camera management, streaming, and log review</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tech Stack</h2><a id="user-content-tech-stack" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tech Stack" href="#tech-stack"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Backend</h3><a id="user-content-backend" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Backend" href="#backend"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>FastAPI</strong>: High-performance async web framework</li>
<li><strong>PostgreSQL</strong>: Relational database for configurations and detection logs</li>
<li><strong>Redis</strong>: Message broker for Celery tasks</li>
<li><strong>Celery</strong>: Distributed task queue for background AI inference</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">AI &amp; Computer Vision</h3><a id="user-content-ai--computer-vision" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: AI &amp; Computer Vision" href="#ai--computer-vision"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Ultralytics YOLO</strong>: Object detection with support for multiple pre-loaded models</li>
<li><strong>OpenCV</strong>: Image processing and annotation</li>
<li><strong>Torch/TorchVision</strong>: PyTorch ecosystem for AI inference</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Streaming &amp; Media</h3><a id="user-content-streaming--media" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Streaming &amp; Media" href="#streaming--media"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>MediaMTX</strong>: RTSP to WebRTC streaming server</li>
<li><strong>HLS</strong>: Real-time streaming protocol</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Infrastructure</h3><a id="user-content-infrastructure" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Infrastructure" href="#infrastructure"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prerequisites</h2><a id="user-content-prerequisites" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prerequisites" href="#prerequisites"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Docker and Docker Compose</li>
<li>Intel-based mini PC (recommended) with at least 8GB RAM and i3+ CPU (for deployment)</li>

<li>Stable LAN network connection</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Installation</h2><a id="user-content-installation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Installation" href="#installation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

# Edit .env with your configuration"><pre>cp .env.example .env

</li>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">API Documentation</h2><a id="user-content-api-documentation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: API Documentation" href="#api-documentation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The application provides a REST API with the following endpoints:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Cameras</h3><a id="user-content-cameras" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Cameras" href="#cameras"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>GET /api/cameras</code> - List all cameras</li>
<li><code>POST /api/cameras</code> - Add new camera</li>
<li><code>PUT /api/cameras/{id}</code> - Update camera configuration</li>
<li><code>DELETE /api/cameras/{id}</code> - Remove camera</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Detections</h3><a id="user-content-detections" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Detections" href="#detections"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>GET /api/detections</code> - Get paginated detection logs</li>
<li><code>GET /api/detections/{id}</code> - Get specific detection details</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">WebSocket</h3><a id="user-content-websocket" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: WebSocket" href="#websocket"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>WS /ws/{camera_id}</code> - Real-time notifications for camera detections</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Health &amp; Metrics</h3><a id="user-content-health--metrics" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Health &amp; Metrics" href="#health--metrics"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>GET /health</code> - Application health check</li>
<li><code>GET /metrics</code> - Prometheus metrics endpoint</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Full API documentation available at <code>http://&lt;host&gt;:8000/scalar</code> when running.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Development Guidelines</h3><a id="user-content-development-guidelines" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Development Guidelines" href="#development-guidelines"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Follow PEP 8 style guidelines</li>
<li>Use type hints for function parameters and return values</li>
<li>Update documentation for API changes</li>
<li>Ensure Docker compatibility for all changes</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Architecture Overview</h2><a id="user-content-architecture-overview" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Architecture Overview" href="#architecture-overview"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The application consists of several key components:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>FastAPI App</strong>: Main web server handling API requests and WebSocket connections</li>
<li><strong>Celery Workers</strong>: Background tasks for AI inference and image processing</li>
<li><strong>MediaMTX</strong>: Media streaming server for RTSP to WebRTC conversion</li>
<li><strong>PostgreSQL</strong>: Data persistence for camera configs and detection logs</li>
<li><strong>Redis</strong>: Task queue and result backend for Celery</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">All components are containerized and orchestrated via Docker Compose for easy deployment on edge devices.</p>
</article></div>3e:T41f,<div id="readme" class="md" data-path="README.md"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">wms-colorindo-api</h1><a id="user-content-wms-colorindo-api" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: wms-colorindo-api" href="#wms-colorindo-api"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Getting Started</h1><a id="user-content-getting-started" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Getting Started" href="#getting-started"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 1: Start Metro</h2><a id="user-content-step-1-start-metro" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 1: Start Metro" href="#step-1-start-metro"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">First, you will need to run <strong>Metro</strong>, the JavaScript build tool for React Native.</p>
<p dir="auto">To start the Metro dev server, run the following command from the root of your React Native project:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Using npm
npm start

# OR using Yarn
yarn start"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Using npm</span>
npm start

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> OR using Yarn</span>
yarn start</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 2: Build and run your app</h2><a id="user-content-step-2-build-and-run-your-app" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 2: Build and run your app" href="#step-2-build-and-run-your-app"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">With Metro running, open a new terminal window/pane from the root of your React Native project, and use one of the following commands to build and run your Android or iOS app:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Android</h3><a id="user-content-android" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Android" href="#android"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Using npm
npm run android

# OR using Yarn
yarn android"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Using npm</span>
npm run android

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> OR using Yarn</span>
yarn android</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">iOS</h3><a id="user-content-ios" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: iOS" href="#ios"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">For iOS, remember to install CocoaPods dependencies (this only needs to be run on first clone or after updating native deps).</p>
<p dir="auto">The first time you create a new project, run the Ruby bundler to install CocoaPods itself:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="bundle install"><pre>bundle install</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Then, and every time you update your native dependencies, run:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="bundle exec pod install"><pre>bundle <span class="pl-c1">exec</span> pod install</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">For more information, please visit <a href="https://guides.cocoapods.org/using/getting-started.html" rel="nofollow">CocoaPods Getting Started guide</a>.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Using npm
npm run ios

# OR using Yarn
yarn ios"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Using npm</span>
npm run ios

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> OR using Yarn</span>
yarn ios</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">If everything is set up correctly, you should see your new app running in the Android Emulator, iOS Simulator, or your connected device.</p>
<p dir="auto">This is one way to run your app — you can also build it directly from Android Studio or Xcode.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Step 3: Modify your app</h2><a id="user-content-step-3-modify-your-app" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Step 3: Modify your app" href="#step-3-modify-your-app"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Now that you have successfully run the app, let's make changes!</p>
<p dir="auto">Open <code>App.tsx</code> in your text editor of choice and make some changes. When you save, your app will automatically update and reflect these changes — this is powered by <a href="https://reactnative.dev/docs/fast-refresh" rel="nofollow">Fast Refresh</a>.</p>
<p dir="auto">When you want to forcefully reload, for example to reset the state of your app, you can perform a full reload:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Android</strong>: Press the <kbd>R</kbd> key twice or select <strong>"Reload"</strong> from the <strong>Dev Menu</strong>, accessed via <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>M</kbd> (Windows/Linux) or <kbd>Cmd ⌘</kbd> + <kbd>M</kbd> (macOS).</li>
<li><strong>iOS</strong>: Press <kbd>R</kbd> in iOS Simulator.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Congratulations! 🎉</h2><a id="user-content-congratulations-tada" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Congratulations! :tada:" href="#congratulations-tada"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">You've successfully run and modified your React Native App. 🥳</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Now what?</h3><a id="user-content-now-what" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Now what?" href="#now-what"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>If you want to add this new React Native code to an existing application, check out the <a href="https://reactnative.dev/docs/integration-with-existing-apps" rel="nofollow">Integration guide</a>.</li>
<li>If you're curious to learn more about React Native, check out the <a href="https://reactnative.dev/docs/getting-started" rel="nofollow">docs</a>.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Troubleshooting</h1><a id="user-content-troubleshooting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Troubleshooting" href="#troubleshooting"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
