Install dependecies" href="#3-install-dependecies"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">type in cmd:
npm i -g sequelize-cli
npm i</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Migrate database &amp; seed</h1><a id="user-content-4-migrate-database--seed" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Migrate database &amp; seed" href="#4-migrate-database--seed"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create database 'wms_tmmin2karawang'</li>
<li>Migrate by type in cmd 'sequelize db:migrate'</li>
<li>Running seed by type in cmd 'sequelize db:seed:all'</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Important :</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Create model &amp; migration: sequelize model:generate --name  --attributes :,:</li>
<li>Create seed: sequelize seed:generate --name </li>
</ol>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Deskripsi</h2><a id="user-content-deskripsi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Deskripsi" href="#deskripsi"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Software untuk proyek gateway Dantotsu Line Komatsu. Aplikasi ini berfungsi sebagai gateway yang menghubungkan perangkat di lapangan dengan server pusat menggunakan protokol MQTT.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fitur Utama</h2><a id="user-content-fitur-utama" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fitur Utama" href="#fitur-utama"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Komunikasi MQTT dua arah (lokal dan server)</li>
<li>Penyimpanan data ke database MySQL</li>
<li>Pengarsipan data otomatis</li>
<li>Pemrosesan alarm dan notifikasi</li>
<li>Sinkronisasi data dengan server pusat</li>
<li>Pemantauan perangkat dan status operasi</li>
<li>Pengelolaan timeline proses produksi</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Teknologi yang Digunakan</h2><a id="user-content-teknologi-yang-digunakan" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Teknologi yang Digunakan" href="#teknologi-yang-digunakan"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Node.js sebagai platform utama</li>
<li>Express.js untuk layanan web</li>
<li>MQTT untuk komunikasi antar perangkat</li>
<li>MySQL untuk penyimpanan data</li>
<li>Sequelize sebagai ORM</li>
<li>Winston untuk logging</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Persyaratan Sistem</h2><a id="user-content-persyaratan-sistem" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Persyaratan Sistem" href="#persyaratan-sistem"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Konfigurasi Database</h2><a id="user-content-konfigurasi-database" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Konfigurasi Database" href="#konfigurasi-database"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Install mysql dan mysql-workbench
notes: pastikan mengingat password yang digunakan untuk user root untuk log in pertama kali ke dalam mysql</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Pastikan service mysql berjalan, biasanya bernama "MySQL80" atau bisa menggunakan query berikut pada command prompt windows</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="sc query MySQL80"><pre>sc query MySQL80</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Pastikan mysql telah ditambahkan ke dalam PATH, verifikasi dengan menjalankan command berikut pada command prompt windows</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="mysql --version"><pre>mysql --version</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Jika hasilnya adalah <em>"mysql is not recognized as an internal or external command"</em> maka harus menambahkan executable mysql ke dalam PATH terlebih dahulu. Lanjut ke tahap berikutnya apabila kedua command di atas telah menunjukkan hasil.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Alter username dan password database</p>
<p dir="auto">buka cmd kemudian log in ke dalam mysql</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="mysql -u root -p &lt;password&gt;"><pre class="notranslate"><code>mysql -u root -p &lt;password&gt;
</code></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="ALTER USER 'root'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY '';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"><pre>ALTER USER <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>root<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>@<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>localhost<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span> IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span><span class="pl-pds">'</span></span><span class="pl-k">;</span>
FLUSH PRIVILEGES<span class="pl-k">;</span></pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Buat database
Aplikasi ini menggunakan dua database:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>komatsu_gateway</code>: Database utama untuk operasi real-time</li>
<li><code>komatsu_gateway_archive</code>: Database untuk pengarsipan data historis</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">buat database dengan cara</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="mysql -u root -p"><pre>mysql -u root -p</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Tekan 'Enter' ketika diminta memasukkan password.
Lalu, pada cli mysql, buat database dengan perintah</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="CREATE DATABASE komatsu_gateway;
CREATE DATABASE komatsu_gateway_archive;"><pre>CREATE DATABASE komatsu_gateway<span class="pl-k">;</span>
CREATE DATABASE komatsu_gateway_archive<span class="pl-k">;</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Verifikasi database dengan perintah</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="SHOW DATABASES;"><pre>SHOW DATABASES<span class="pl-k">;</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Lalu, exit dari cli mysql dengan perintah</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="exit;"><pre><span class="pl-c1">exit</span><span class="pl-k">;</span></pre></div>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Installasi</h2><a id="user-content-installasi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Installasi" href="#installasi"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Menjalankan Source Code</h3><a id="user-content-menjalankan-source-code" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Menjalankan Source Code" href="#menjalankan-source-code"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Clone repository</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="git clone https://github.com/PT-Ravelware-Technology-Indonesia/gateway-komatsu"><pre>git clone https://github.com/PT-Ravelware-Technology-Indonesia/gateway-komatsu</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Install Dependensi</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npm install"><pre>npm install</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Salin file .env dan ganti konfigurasi</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="cp example.env .env"><pre>cp example.env .env</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Jalankan Aplikasi</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="node src/index.js"><pre>node src/index.js</pre></div>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Build menjadi .exe</h3><a id="user-content-build-menjadi-exe" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Build menjadi .exe" href="#build-menjadi-exe"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Install pkg
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npm install -g pkg"><pre>npm install -g pkg</pre></div>
</li>
<li>Build aplikasi
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npm run build"><pre>npm run build</pre></div>
Aplikasi akan dibuild menjadi file executable di folder <code>dist/</code> pastikan .env, postSchema.json, alarmSchema.json berada di dalam satu folder dengan executable ketika executable dijalankan.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Struktur Project</h2><a id="user-content-struktur-project" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Struktur Project" href="#struktur-project"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>src/</code>: folder utama code
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>config/</code>: File konfigurasi</li>
<li><code>controller/</code>: controlleri untuk berbagai fitur</li>
<li><code>model/</code>: Data model dan skema database</li>
<li><code>service/</code>: business services</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>schema/</code>: Skema JSON untuk validasi data</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>npm run eject</code></h3><a id="user-content-npm-run-eject" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: npm run eject" href="#npm-run-eject"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Note: this is a one-way operation. Once you <code>eject</code>, you can't go back!</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">If you aren't satisfied with the build tool and configuration choices, you can <code>eject</code> at any time. This command will remove the single build dependency from your project.</p>
<p dir="auto">Instead, it will copy all the configuration files and the transitive dependencies (webpack, Babel, ESLint, etc) right into your project so you have full control over them. All of the commands except <code>eject</code> will still work, but they will point to the copied scripts so you can tweak them. At this point you're on your own.</p>
<p dir="auto">You don't have to ever use <code>eject</code>. The curated feature set is suitable for small and middle deployments, and you shouldn't feel obligated to use this feature. However we understand that this tool wouldn't be useful if you couldn't customize it when you are ready for it.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Environment Management</h2><a id="user-content-1-environment-management" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Environment Management" href="#1-environment-management"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini mendukung dua tipe konfigurasi environment:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong><code>public/runtime-env.js</code></strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Dipakai untuk mengubah environment <strong>saat runtime</strong> (misalnya API URL berbeda di staging vs production tanpa rebuild).</li>
<li>File ini akan di-load langsung di browser.</li>
<li>Contoh isinya:
<div class="highlight highlight-source-js notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="window.RUNTIME_ENV = {
  REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST: &quot;false&quot;,
  REACT_APP_API_HOST: &quot;http://localhost:3000/api&quot;,
  REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST: &quot;ws://localhost:3000&quot;,
  REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST: &quot;mqtt://localhost:1883&quot;,
  REACT_APP_NAME: &quot;Shadcn Template Webserver&quot;,
};"><pre><span class="pl-smi">window</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-c1">RUNTIME_ENV</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"false"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_API_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"http://localhost:3000/api"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"ws://localhost:3000"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST</span>: <span class="pl-s">"mqtt://localhost:1883"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-c1">REACT_APP_NAME</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Shadcn Template Webserver"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><strong><code>.env</code></strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Dipakai di <strong>local development</strong> atau saat <strong>build</strong> untuk variable sensitif.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Contoh:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="NODE_ENV=development
NODE_PATH=./src
REACT_APP_NAME=Shadcn Template Webserver
REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST=false
REACT_APP_API_HOST=http://89.116.121.128:3001/
REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST=ws://localhost:3000
REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST=mqtt://localhost:1883
REACT_APP_MQTT_USERNAME=ravelware
REACT_APP_MQTT_PASSWORD=r4v3lw4r3
"><pre class="notranslate"><code>NODE_ENV=development
NODE_PATH=./src
REACT_APP_NAME=Shadcn Template Webserver
REACT_APP_BROWSER_HOST=false
REACT_APP_API_HOST=http://89.116.121.128:3001/
REACT_APP_SOCKET_HOST=ws://localhost:3000
REACT_APP_MQTT_HOST=mqtt://localhost:1883
REACT_APP_MQTT_USERNAME=ravelware
REACT_APP_MQTT_PASSWORD=r4v3lw4r3

</code></pre></div>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Menambahkan Komponen Baru (via shadcn)</h2><a id="user-content-2-menambahkan-komponen-baru-via-shadcn" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Menambahkan Komponen Baru (via shadcn)" href="#2-menambahkan-komponen-baru-via-shadcn"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Shadcn UI menyediakan generator komponen via CLI.</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Jalankan perintah:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npx shadcn@latest add button"><pre>npx shadcn@latest add button</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Ini akan menambahkan komponen <code>Button</code> ke folder <code>@/components/ui</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Untuk menambahkan beberapa komponen sekaligus:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="npx shadcn@latest add input card dialog"><pre>npx shadcn@latest add input card dialog</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Semua komponen yang ditambahkan bisa langsung diimpor:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-tsx notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="import { Button } from &quot;@/components/ui/button&quot;;

export default function Example() {
  return &lt;Button&gt;Click Me&lt;/Button&gt;;
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-v">Button</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"@/components/ui/button"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-v">Example</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">&lt;</span><span class="pl-v">Button</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span>Click Me<span class="pl-kos">&lt;/</span><span class="pl-v">Button</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Modifikasi Styling Token (index.css)</h2><a id="user-content-3-modifikasi-styling-token-indexcss" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Modifikasi Styling Token (index.css)" href="#3-modifikasi-styling-token-indexcss"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini pakai <strong>CSS custom properties</strong> (design tokens).</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">Buka file <code>src/index.css</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Cari section <code>:root</code> (atau <code>:root[data-theme="dark"]</code> untuk mode dark).<br>
Contoh bawaan:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=":root {
  --radius: 0.625rem;
  --background: oklch(96% 0.03 250);
  --foreground: oklch(0.145 0 0);
  --card: oklch(1 0 0);
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">:</span><span class="pl-c1">root</span> {
  <span class="pl-s1">--radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">0.625<span class="pl-smi">rem</span></span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--background</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">oklch</span>(<span class="pl-c1">96<span class="pl-smi">%</span></span> <span class="pl-c1">0.03</span> <span class="pl-c1">250</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--foreground</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">oklch</span>(<span class="pl-c1">0.145</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--card</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">oklch</span>(<span class="pl-c1">1</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>);
}</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Ubah sesuai kebutuhan.<br>
Misalnya mau ganti radius global:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=":root {
  --radius: 1rem;
}"><pre><span class="pl-kos">:</span><span class="pl-c1">root</span> {
  <span class="pl-s1">--radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">1<span class="pl-smi">rem</span></span>;
}</pre></div>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">Token ini dipakai di seluruh komponen shadcn (terintegrasi dengan Tailwind).</p>
</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Menambahkan Route Baru (TanStack Router + Menu Config)</h2><a id="user-content-4-menambahkan-route-baru-tanstack-router--menu-config" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Menambahkan Route Baru (TanStack Router + Menu Config)" href="#4-menambahkan-route-baru-tanstack-router--menu-config"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Template ini pakai <strong>TanStack Router</strong> + <strong>Menu Config</strong> sebagai sumber truth.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Langkah 1: Tambahkan Page Baru</h3><a id="user-content-langkah-1-tambahkan-page-baru" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Langkah 1: Tambahkan Page Baru" href="#langkah-1-tambahkan-page-baru"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Buat file page, misalnya:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-tsx notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="// src/pages/auth/Outbound.tsx
export default function Outbound() {
  return &lt;div&gt;Outbound Page&lt;/div&gt;;
}"><pre><span class="pl-c">// src/pages/auth/Outbound.tsx</span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">default</span> <span class="pl-k">function</span> <span class="pl-v">Outbound</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
  <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">&lt;</span><span class="pl-s1">div</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span>Outbound Page<span class="pl-kos">&lt;/</span><span class="pl-s1">div</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Langkah 2: Daftarkan di <code>MENU_LIST</code></h3><a id="user-content-langkah-2-daftarkan-di-menu_list" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Langkah 2: Daftarkan di MENU_LIST" href="#langkah-2-daftarkan-di-menu_list"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Edit <code>src/configs/menu-config.ts</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-ts notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="import { ArrowDownToLine } from &quot;lucide-react&quot;;
const Outbound = lazy(() =&gt; import(&quot;@/pages/auth/Outbound&quot;));

export const MENU_LIST: MenuListType[] = [
  // existing...
  {
    name: &quot;Outbound&quot;,
    code: &quot;Outbound&quot;,
    icon: ArrowDownToLine,
    path: &quot;/outbound&quot;,
    component: Outbound,
    protected: true,
    showInMenu: true,
  },
];"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-v">ArrowDownToLine</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"lucide-react"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-v">Outbound</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">lazy</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">=&gt;</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"@/pages/auth/Outbound"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

<span class="pl-k">export</span> <span class="pl-k">const</span> <span class="pl-c1">MENU_LIST</span>: <span class="pl-smi">MenuListType</span><span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-kos">[</span>
  <span class="pl-c">// existing...</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Outbound"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">code</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Outbound"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">icon</span>: <span class="pl-v">ArrowDownToLine</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">path</span>: <span class="pl-s">"/outbound"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">component</span>: <span class="pl-v">Outbound</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">protected</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
    <span class="pl-c1">showInMenu</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
  <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span>
<span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span></pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Langkah 3: Router Otomatis Generate</h3><a id="user-content-langkah-3-router-otomatis-generate" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Langkah 3: Router Otomatis Generate" href="#langkah-3-router-otomatis-generate"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Router akan otomatis menambahkan route dari <code>MENU_LIST</code>.<br>
Tidak perlu define manual lagi di <code>route.tsx</code>, cukup update <code>MENU_LIST</code>.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">5. Public vs Protected Route</h2><a id="user-content-5-public-vs-protected-route" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 5. Public vs Protected Route" href="#5-public-vs-protected-route"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Protected</strong> → pakai <code>RequireAuth</code> (butuh login namun bisa dibypass melalui isBypass = true).</li>
<li><strong>Public</strong> → pakai <code>RequireGuest</code> (untuk login/register page).</li>
<li>Flag <code>protected</code> di <code>MENU_LIST</code> menentukan masuknya route ke dalam public/protected.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">6. ACL Utility</h2><a id="user-content-6-acl-utility" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 6. ACL Utility" href="#6-acl-utility"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Utility ini digunakan untuk melakukan pengecekan izin (permission) berdasarkan <strong>ACL (Access Control List)</strong> yang disimpan di <code>aclStore</code>.<br>
Tujuannya agar komponen UI atau logic hanya berjalan jika user memiliki hak akses tertentu (Read, Create, Update, Delete).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Lokasi</h3><a id="user-content-lokasi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Lokasi" href="#lokasi"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>@/utils/has-permission.ts</code></p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Dependensi</h3><a id="user-content-dependensi" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Dependensi" href="#dependensi"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>aclStore</code> dari <code>@/stores/acl-store</code><br>
Store ini menyimpan daftar action yang dimiliki user terhadap setiap page/module.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">API</h3><a id="user-content-api" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: API" href="#api"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>hasReadPermission(code: string): boolean</code></h4><a id="user-content-hasreadpermissioncode-string-boolean" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: hasReadPermission(code: string): boolean" href="#hasreadpermissioncode-string-boolean"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Mengecek apakah user memiliki permission <strong>Read</strong> untuk page/module dengan <code>page_code</code> tertentu.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto"><code>hasCreatePermission(code: string): boolean</code></h4><a id="user-content-hascreatepermissioncode-string-boolean" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: hasCreatePermission(code: string): boolean" href="#hascreatepermissioncode-string-boolean"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-tsx notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="import { hasReadPermission, hasUpdatePermission } from &quot;@/utils/acl&quot;;

function UserTable() {
  if (!hasReadPermission(&quot;User&quot;)) {
    return &lt;p&gt;You don’t have permission to view users.&lt;/p&gt;;
  }

  return (
    &lt;Table&gt;
      {/* kolom lainnya */}
      {hasUpdatePermission(&quot;User&quot;) &amp;&amp; (
        &lt;Button onClick={handleEdit}&gt;Edit User&lt;/Button&gt;
      )}
    &lt;/Table&gt;
  );
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span> <span class="pl-s1">hasReadPermission</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-s1">hasUpdatePermission</span> <span class="pl-kos">}</span> <span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s">"@/utils/acl"</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

    <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">&lt;</span><span class="pl-s1">p</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span>You don’t have permission to view users.<span class="pl-kos">&lt;/</span><span class="pl-s1">p</span><span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>

      <span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-c">/* kolom lainnya */</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span>
      <span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-en">hasUpdatePermission</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"User"</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-c1">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="pl-kos">(</span>

</li>

<li><strong>Ubah env saat runtime</strong> → <code>public/runtime-env.js</code>.</li>

</ul>

</article></div>4a:Tc471,<div id="readme" class="md" data-path="README.md"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">People Traffic AI Engine</h1><a id="user-content-people-traffic-ai-engine" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: People Traffic AI Engine" href="#people-traffic-ai-engine"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Real-time people detection and counting system using YOLOv11 + ByteTrack, served via FastAPI. Supports up to <strong>4 simultaneous video sources</strong> (RTSP camera / video file) managed through MediaMTX, with annotated MJPEG stream for monitoring.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Architecture Overview</h2><a id="user-content-architecture-overview" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Architecture Overview" href="#architecture-overview"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="                        ┌─────────────────────────────┐
                        │         FastAPI              │
                        │                              │
  Client ───── POST /sources/{name}/activate ──────────┤
                        │          │                   │
                        │    MediaMTXService           │
                        │    (httpx async)             │
                        │          │                   │
                        └──────────┼───────────────────┘
                                   │ REST API
                        ┌──────────▼───────────────────┐
                        │          MediaMTX             │
                        │   (pull from source URL)      │
                        │                              │
                        │  RTSP :8554  HLS :8888        │
                        │  WebRTC :8889                 │
                        └──────────────────────────────┘

  Single-camera detection pipeline (separate):
  Camera ──► CaptureThread ──► DetectionService (YOLO+ByteTrack) ──► MJPEG /stream/stream"><pre class="notranslate"><code>                        ┌─────────────────────────────┐
                        │         FastAPI              │
                        │                              │
  Client ───── POST /sources/{name}/activate ──────────┤
                        │          │                   │
                        │    MediaMTXService           │
                        │    (httpx async)             │
                        │          │                   │
                        └──────────┼───────────────────┘
                                   │ REST API
                        ┌──────────▼───────────────────┐
                        │          MediaMTX             │
                        │   (pull from source URL)      │
                        │                              │
                        │  RTSP :8554  HLS :8888        │
                        │  WebRTC :8889                 │
                        └──────────────────────────────┘

  Single-camera detection pipeline (separate):
  Camera ──► CaptureThread ──► DetectionService (YOLO+ByteTrack) ──► MJPEG /stream/stream
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Dua pipeline yang berjalan terpisah:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Multi-source streaming</strong> — MediaMTX menarik feed mentah dari kamera dan re-publish via RTSP/HLS/WebRTC. Klien subscribe langsung ke MediaMTX.</li>
<li><strong>Detection pipeline</strong> — Satu kamera diproses YOLO, hasilnya tersedia sebagai MJPEG stream dari FastAPI (frame sudah dianotasi bounding box + counting).</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Requirements</h2><a id="user-content-requirements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Requirements" href="#requirements"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Python 3.11+</li>
<li><a href="https://docs.astral.sh/uv/" rel="nofollow">uv</a> (recommended) atau pip</li>
<li>Docker &amp; Docker Compose (untuk MediaMTX)</li>
<li>RTSP-capable camera atau file video</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Installation</h2><a id="user-content-installation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Installation" href="#installation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

cd people-traffic-ai-engine"><pre>git clone <span class="pl-k">&lt;</span>repo-url<span class="pl-k">&gt;</span>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Install dependencies</h3><a id="user-content-2-install-dependencies" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. Configure environment</h3><a id="user-content-3-configure-environment" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. Configure environment" href="#3-configure-environment"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Copy <code>.env.example</code> ke <code>.env</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="cp .env.example .env"><pre>cp .env.example .env</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Edit <code>.env</code> sesuai kebutuhan:</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Detection pipeline:</strong></p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Variable</th>
<th>Default</th>
<th>Keterangan</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>RTSP_STREAM_URL</code></td>
<td><code>rtsp://...</code></td>
<td>URL stream kamera untuk detection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>APP_LINE_COORDS</code></td>
<td><code>[[0,540],[1920,540]]</code></td>
<td>Koordinat garis penghitung</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>APP_IN_SIGN</code></td>
<td><code>1</code></td>
<td>Arah masuk: <code>1</code> atau <code>-1</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>MODEL</code></td>
<td><code>yolo11n_openvino_model</code></td>
<td>Model YOLO yang dipakai</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>CONF</code></td>
<td><code>0.5</code></td>
<td>Confidence threshold</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>IOU</code></td>
<td><code>0.45</code></td>
<td>IoU threshold</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>IMGSZ</code></td>
<td><code>640</code></td>
<td>Ukuran input inference</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto"><strong>MediaMTX connection:</strong></p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Variable</th>
<th>Default</th>
<th>Keterangan</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>MEDIAMTX_HOST</code></td>
<td><code>localhost</code></td>
<td>Host MediaMTX</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>MEDIAMTX_API_PORT</code></td>
<td><code>9997</code></td>
<td>Port REST API MediaMTX</td>
</tr>

<td><code>MEDIAMTX_RTSP_PORT</code></td>
<td><code>8554</code></td>
<td>Port RTSP output</td>
</tr>

<td><code>MEDIAMTX_HLS_PORT</code></td>
<td><code>8888</code></td>
<td>Port HLS output</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>MEDIAMTX_WEBRTC_PORT</code></td>
<td><code>8889</code></td>
<td>Port WebRTC output</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Menjalankan MediaMTX</h2><a id="user-content-menjalankan-mediamtx" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Menjalankan MediaMTX" href="#menjalankan-mediamtx"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">MediaMTX dijalankan via Docker Compose:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="docker compose up -d"><pre>docker compose up -d</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Untuk melihat log:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="docker compose logs -f mediamtx"><pre>docker compose logs -f mediamtx</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Untuk mematikan:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="docker compose down"><pre>docker compose down</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">MediaMTX REST API tersedia di <code>http://localhost:9997</code>.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Menjalankan Server</h2><a id="user-content-menjalankan-server" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Menjalankan Server" href="#menjalankan-server"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"><pre>uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Tanpa <code>--reload</code> untuk production:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"><pre>uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000</pre></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">API Usage</h2><a id="user-content-api-usage" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: API Usage" href="#api-usage"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Source Management</h3><a id="user-content-source-management" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Source Management" href="#source-management"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Kelola video source yang di-stream via MediaMTX. Maksimal <strong>4 source aktif</strong> bersamaan.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Daftarkan source</h4><a id="user-content-daftarkan-source" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Daftarkan source" href="#daftarkan-source"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/sources \
  -H &quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot; \
  -d '{&quot;name&quot;: &quot;parkiran&quot;, &quot;url&quot;: &quot;rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.10:554/stream&quot;}'"><pre>curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/sources \
  -H <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Content-Type: application/json<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  -d <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>{"name": "parkiran", "url": "rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.10:554/stream"}<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Source terdaftar tapi belum streaming. Perlu diaktifkan terlebih dahulu.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Aktifkan source (mulai streaming)</h4><a id="user-content-aktifkan-source-mulai-streaming" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Aktifkan source (mulai streaming)" href="#aktifkan-source-mulai-streaming"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran/activate"><pre>curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran/activate</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Response akan menyertakan URL stream dari MediaMTX:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  &quot;name&quot;: &quot;parkiran&quot;,
  &quot;url&quot;: &quot;rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.10:554/stream&quot;,
  &quot;active&quot;: true,
  &quot;stream_urls&quot;: {
    &quot;rtsp&quot;: &quot;rtsp://localhost:8554/sources/parkiran&quot;,
    &quot;hls&quot;: &quot;http://localhost:8888/sources/parkiran&quot;,
    &quot;webrtc&quot;: &quot;http://localhost:8889/sources/parkiran&quot;
  }
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"name"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>parkiran<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"url"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.10:554/stream<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"active"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"stream_urls"</span>: {
    <span class="pl-ent">"rtsp"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>rtsp://localhost:8554/sources/parkiran<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"hls"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://localhost:8888/sources/parkiran<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
    <span class="pl-ent">"webrtc"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>http://localhost:8889/sources/parkiran<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
  }
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Klien kemudian subscribe langsung ke URL MediaMTX tersebut (VLC, browser, dsb).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Edit source (rename / ganti URL)</h4><a id="user-content-edit-source-rename--ganti-url" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Edit source (rename / ganti URL)" href="#edit-source-rename--ganti-url"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Ganti URL saja (hot-swap, tanpa interupsi jika sedang aktif)
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran \
  -H &quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot; \
  -d '{&quot;url&quot;: &quot;rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.10:554/stream2&quot;}'

# Rename saja
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran \
  -H &quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot; \
  -d '{&quot;name&quot;: &quot;lobby&quot;}'

# Rename dan ganti URL sekaligus
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran \
  -H &quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot; \
  -d '{&quot;name&quot;: &quot;lobby&quot;, &quot;url&quot;: &quot;rtsp://...&quot;}'"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Ganti URL saja (hot-swap, tanpa interupsi jika sedang aktif)</span>
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran \
  -H <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Content-Type: application/json<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  -d <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>{"url": "rtsp://admin:pass@192.168.1.10:554/stream2"}<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Rename saja</span>
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:8000/sources/parkiran \
  -H <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Content-Type: application/json<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  -d <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>{"name": "lobby"}<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>

<p dir="auto">Source tetap terdaftar dan bisa diaktifkan kembali.</p>

  -H &quot;Content-Type: application/json&quot; \
  -d '{&quot;conf&quot;: 0.6, &quot;iou&quot;: 0.5}'"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Lihat konfigurasi model saat ini</span>

  -H <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Content-Type: application/json<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \

</code></pre></div>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Konfigurasi Garis Penghitung</h2><a id="user-content-konfigurasi-garis-penghitung" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Konfigurasi Garis Penghitung" href="#konfigurasi-garis-penghitung"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>LINE_COORDS</code> menentukan garis virtual untuk menghitung orang masuk/keluar. Koordinat dalam piksel sesuai resolusi kamera.</p>
<p dir="auto">Contoh kamera 1920x1080, garis horizontal di tengah:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="APP_LINE_COORDS=[[0, 540], [1920, 540]]"><pre class="notranslate"><code>APP_LINE_COORDS=[[0, 540], [1920, 540]]
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>IN_SIGN</code> menentukan sisi yang dianggap "masuk":</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>1</code> = bergerak dari atas ke bawah dihitung masuk</li>
<li><code>-1</code> = sebaliknya</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Cara kerja counting</h3><a id="user-content-cara-kerja-counting" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Cara kerja counting" href="#cara-kerja-counting"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Setiap orang yang terdeteksi diberi <strong>track ID</strong> unik oleh ByteTrack</li>
<li>Posisi centroid tiap frame dievaluasi terhadap garis</li>
<li>Jika centroid <strong>berpindah sisi</strong> melewati garis → counter in/out diincrement</li>
<li><strong>Dedup aktif</strong> — satu arah crossing hanya dihitung sekali sampai orang kembali ke sisi semula</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Visual di stream</h3><a id="user-content-visual-di-stream" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Visual di stream" href="#visual-di-stream"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</tr>

<td>Sudah crossing ke sisi OUT</td>
</tr>

<td>Berada di sisi IN, belum crossing</td>
</tr>

<td>Berada di sisi OUT, belum crossing</td>
</tr>
</tbody>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Struktur Project</h2><a id="user-content-struktur-project" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Struktur Project" href="#struktur-project"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</article></div>4c:T2691,<div id="readme" class="md" data-path="README.md"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">DWS-SiCepat Middleware</h1><a id="user-content-dws-sicepat-middleware" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: DWS-SiCepat Middleware" href="#dws-sicepat-middleware"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Edge computing middleware untuk sistem <strong>Dimensioning, Weighing, Scanning (DWS)</strong> SiCepat. Mengintegrasikan kamera depth, timbangan, dan barcode scanner menjadi satu pipeline yang mempublikasikan hasil pengukuran paket ke backend via MQTT.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fitur Utama</h2><a id="user-content-fitur-utama" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fitur Utama" href="#fitur-utama"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Dimensioning</strong> — pengukuran panjang, lebar, tinggi, dan volumetrik parcel</li>
<li><strong>Weighing</strong> — pembacaan berat dari BLE scale secara real-time</li>
<li><strong>Scanning</strong> — pembacaan barcode dari TCP scanner</li>
<li><strong>Live Preview</strong> — MJPEG streaming untuk monitoring operator</li>
<li><strong>Auto Calibration</strong> — intrinsics kamera dibaca otomatis dari SDK</li>
<li><strong>MQTT Publishing</strong> — hasil transaksi (barcode, weight, dimensi, foto) dikirim ke backend</li>
<li><strong>REST API</strong> — konfigurasi runtime via FastAPI + Scalar docs</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Tech Stack</h2><a id="user-content-tech-stack" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Tech Stack" href="#tech-stack"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Python 3.11+</strong> dengan UV package manager</li>
<li><strong>FastAPI</strong> — HTTP server &amp; REST API</li>
<li><strong>OpenCV + NumPy</strong> — image processing</li>
<li><strong>pyorbbecsdk</strong> — depth camera interface</li>
<li><strong>Bleak</strong> — BLE communication</li>
<li><strong>aiomqtt</strong> — async MQTT client</li>
<li><strong>Loguru</strong> — structured logging</li>
<li><strong>PyInstaller + Inno Setup</strong> — Windows deployment</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Hardware Requirements</h2><a id="user-content-hardware-requirements" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Hardware Requirements" href="#hardware-requirements"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Orbbec depth camera (tested: Astra 2)</li>
<li>BLE-enabled weight scale</li>
<li>TCP barcode scanner</li>
<li>Windows 10/11</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">Quick Start</h2><a id="user-content-quick-start" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Quick Start" href="#quick-start"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
